message:
fix(codegen): Fix allocator comma bug and hoist nested classes to file level

Two fixes for CI test failures:

1. Fix __global_allocatornull bug - Missing comma between allocator and
   null when function has no args but has default parameters. Now tracks
   `allocator_was_emitted` to add comma before default null values.

2. Hoist nested classes to file level - Nested classes (like ioclass)
   were generated inside parent struct, making them inaccessible from
   child classes. Now generated at file level with mangled names so they
   can be referenced from anywhere (e.g., PyStringIOPickleTest__ioclass).

These fixes reduce ~74 compilation errors in CI (20 from allocator bug,
54 from nested class scoping).
